title: The true cost of software development, updated for the world of AI
abstract: Worried about the costs of software development in today’s AI-driven world? Don’t worry, we’ve got you covered with our updated analysis of true costs. It's not just about lines of code and developer salaries anymore. Dive into the latest insights!
abstract_zh: 你还在为开发一款软件头疼吗？别担心，我们帮你算了算AI时代的真正成本！这不仅仅是代码行数和程序员工资那么简单了。快来了解最新的开发秘籍吧！
